title: Stock Market Sell-Off: Is Carnival a Buy?

title: Carnival stock is suffering its worst year on record, but looks ‘overly compelling' to this analyst
text: Shares of Carnival Corp. have had a really bad year, even worse than the pandemic year of 2020. And that's what makes Stifel Nicolaus analyst Steven Wieczynski believe the stock is now “overly compelling.

title: Carnival Sails Into Calmer Waters
text: There was finally some good news coming from cruise operator Carnival Corp. ( CCL , Financial) recently. The company has reported that bookings of its cruise line picked up, causing its shares to jump more than 4% on Wednesday.

title: Carnival (CCL) Q4 Earnings Top, Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Carnival's (CCL) fourth-quarter fiscal 2022 performance reflects solid booking trends courtesy of relaxed protocols, the opening of more markets for cruise travel and advertising efforts.

title: Why Carnival Stock Sailed Higher on Wednesday
text: Carnival's still sailing through a financial storm, but investors are just happy it hasn't sunk.

title: Carnival bookings and revenues climb as cruise restrictions lifted
text: Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL) shares rallied strongly as chief executive Josh Weinstein insisted the cruise operator was ‘accelerating' towards strong profitability after bookings picked up. Losses at the US-based group were US$1.6bn (US$2.6bn) before tax in the three months to end November 2022, with a full-year deficit of US$6.1bn (US$9.5bn).

title: Carnival posts narrower-than-expected adjusted loss but revenue misses mark
text: Carnival Corp. CCL, +5.57% shares fell 2% in early trades Wednesday after the cruise company fell short of the analyst estimate for fourth-quarter revenue. The company said its fourth-quarter net loss narrowed to $1.6 billion, or $1.27 a share, from a loss of $2.62 billion, or $2.31 a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: Bunzl and Carnival trading updates, Wednesday's agenda
text: Relative riches in midweek with a FTSE 100 company, in the form of Bunzl PLC (LSE:BNZL) (Bunzl PLC (LSE:BNZL)), which issued a bullish update a few weeks ago but has seen the investor confidence drain away in recent days, not helped by sentiment being dented by reports the UK is close to a ban on single use plastics. This has drawn attention to how much of the company's business is reliant on single-use and disposable items in packaging, hygiene, personal protection equipment, cleaning and other products for food, retail, safety, healthcare and other sectors – but the impact is not expected to be seen in this week's update.

title: Earnings Previews: Carnival, Rite Aid
text: At Monday's opening bell, stocks traded just slightly lower. Within an hour, the Nasdaq traded down by around 0.05%, the S&P 500 down less than 1%, and the Dow up about 0.3%.

title: 5 Formerly Red-Hot Stocks Are Buy-Rated and Incredibly Trading Under $10

title: Carnival's wage and fuel cost volatility is rocking the recovering investment boat
text: Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL)/Carnival PLC (LSE:CCL) will weigh anchor on Wednesday and unload a pre-Christmas trading update where analysts are concerned about rising wage and advertising costs as well as fuel volatility. At a recent presentation for investors and analysts the FTSE 250-listed cruise operator, which owns brands including Princess Cruises, P&O Cruises, Holland America and AIDA, suggested occupancy in the fourth quarter would be down 20% compared to pre-pandemic 2019, which is 95% of current capacity, compared to the 29% disparity in the third quarter, when it was at 92% capacity.

title: Cruise lines will continue to offer cheap cruises into 2023 — but they might not stick around for long
text: In 2021, cruise lines like Carnival and Royal Caribbean started offering fares for as low as $29 a day to fill ships. They could soon vanish.

title: 10 Companies Will Thrive During Next Year's Recession, Analysts
text: Recession is likely next year, at least according to the bond market. But some S&P 500 companies will skate right through it, analysts say.

title: Giant Fund Dumps Carnival Stock, Buys Snap, Warner Bros., and Baker Hughes
text: South Korea's pension, one of the world's biggest, sold all its Carnival stock, and increased stakes in Snap, Warner Bros. Discovery, and Baker Hughes in the third quarter.

title: Carnival says first six cruises of 'Carnival Jubilee' postponed due to shipyard delays on delivery of the ship
text: Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL) has announced that its Carnival Cruise Line has notified guests booked on the first six cruises of 'Carnival Jubilee' that because of shipyard delays, delivery of the ship has been postponed and the first cruise will now be on December 23, 2023, with embarkation from Galveston, Texas. 'Carnival Jubilee' is under construction at Meyer Werft in Papenburg, Germany.
